title: InventoryFacetsRequest
description: Typed AAP request for the `inventory.facets` skill. An optional `filters` block scopes the facets to a subset of inventory (e.g. `condition: ['used']`). Carried inside an A2A `Message.parts[].data` DataPart via the `SendMessage` operation.

filters.description: Optional filters to scope facet aggregation. Same shape as inventory.search filters; all fields are optional.
